input.prompt:
You are editing the repo at /Users/psoudan/workspace/11-personal/portugal (Bun monorepo).

Implement the user's feature request in apps/frontend-web:

1. **plot-storage.ts** - Already has `patchActiveScoringConfig` after saveSnapshot - verify it exists.

2. **apps/frontend-web/src/lib/scoring-config-mutations.ts** - Extend file:
   - Add `export type CategoryCriteriaGroup` and `export function groupCriteriaByCategory(config)` - group criteria by category order from config.categories, then orphaned category ids. Use types from @portugal/domain-shared (CategoryDefinition or ScoringConfig["categories"][number]).
   - Append `addNewProfile` and `addNewCriterion` async functions returning ProfileId | null / CriterionId | null, using patchActiveScoringConfig (same logic as in use-config-editor.ts).

3. **apps/frontend-web/src/hooks/use-config-editor.ts** - Refactor to import all mutation functions from `../lib/scoring-config-mutations` instead of duplicating. Replace persistConfig calls: after each mutation, `const loaded = await loadSnapshot(); setSnapshot(loaded);`. For addNewProfile/addNewCriterion use returned ids for setSelected*.

4. **packages/ui-lib/.../PlotCriteriaEditorPanel.tsx** - Add optional prop `showCriterionSelector?: boolean` (default true). When false, hide the criterion Select at top.

5. **apps/frontend-web/src/panels/panel-types.ts** - Add `CATEGORY_DETAIL_PANEL_TYPE = "category-detail"`.

6. **apps/frontend-web/src/panels/category-detail-panel.tsx** (new) - Like criterion panel: use usePanelSnapshot, DetailPanelShell, show category id/name/description; if useAuth().canManageData, editable inputs for name/description calling `updateCategoryField` from scoring-config-mutations. List criteria in category as links or buttons that open criterion detail panel.

7. **apps/frontend-web/src/panels/criterion-detail-panel.tsx** - Keep read-only summary; when canManageData, embed PlotCriteriaEditorPanel with showCriterionSelector={false}, selectedCriterion from snapshot, wire all callbacks to scoring-config-mutations (same as config.tsx).

8. **apps/frontend-web/src/panels/panel-registry.tsx** - Register CategoryDetailPanel.

9. **apps/frontend-web/src/components/scoring-metric-info-button.tsx** (new) - Small Info icon button: TooltipProvider+Tooltip with tooltip text; onClick calls passed onOpenDetail. Use @portugal/ui (Tooltip, Collapsible, etc.) and lucide-react Info.

10. **apps/frontend-web/src/components/plot-raw-metrics-collapsible.tsx** (new) - Shared: groupCriteriaByCategory, map to Collapsible per category with header showing category name + ScoringMetricInfoButton for category (tooltip: description); inside list criteria with raw value (read mode) or PlotCriterionEditorCard (edit mode), each row has info button for criterion (tooltip: description + measurement basis). Props: mode read|edit, config, plot raw metrics or draft + setters for edit.

11. **plot-detail-panel.tsx** and **plot-edit-panel.tsx** - Replace flat criteria list with plot-raw-metrics-collapsible; openPanel CRITERION_DETAIL_PANEL_TYPE / CATEGORY_DETAIL_PANEL_TYPE on info click.

12. **config.tsx** - Add button to open category detail for selected criterion's category OR add category picker - minimally add a way to open category panel: e.g. when selectedCriterionId, button "Category details" opens CATEGORY_DETAIL_PANEL_TYPE with categoryId from selectedCriterion.categoryId.

Use `bun run check` or package scripts to verify TypeScript. Fix any lint issues.

Return a concise summary of files changed.

todos.content: Refactor use-config-editor to use shared mutations
Category panel + criterion panel editing + registry/types
Plot detail/edit grouped collapsible + info tooltips

content.text:
Here is what was already in place versus what was implemented this round.

### Already done (1–3)
- **`patchActiveScoringConfig`** in `apps/frontend-web/src/lib/plot-storage.ts` and **`scoring-config-mutations.ts`** (including `groupCriteriaByCategory`, `updateCategoryField`, `addNewProfile` / `addNewCriterion`).
- **`use-config-editor.ts`** already delegates to those mutations and reloads the snapshot after changes.
- **`PlotCriteriaEditorPanel`** already had `showCriterionSelector`; it now also accepts optional **`className`** (merged on the root `Card` with `cn("mt-6", className)`) so stacked panels can drop the default top margin.

### Implemented now (4–6)

**4 — Category + criterion panels and registry**  
- New **`apps/frontend-web/src/panels/category-detail-panel.tsx`**: shows category id; editable **name** / **description** when `canManageData` and the id exists in `activeConfig.categories`; lists criteria with buttons that open the criterion detail panel; explains missing category rows.  
- **`criterion-detail-panel.tsx`**: keeps the read-only summary and profile weights; when **`canManageData`**, adds **`PlotCriteriaEditorPanel`** with `showCriterionSelector={false}` and `className="mt-2"`, wired to the same mutation helpers as the config page.  
- **`panel-registry.tsx`**: registers **`CategoryDetailPanel`** under `CATEGORY_DETAIL_PANEL_TYPE` (constant was already in `panel-types.ts`).

**5 — Plot detail / edit: grouped, collapsible, tooltips, info → panels**  
- New **`apps/frontend-web/src/components/scoring-info-icon-button.tsx`**: info control with tooltip + click (typed `MouseEvent`) to open the right panel.  
- New **`apps/frontend-web/src/components/plot-raw-metrics-by-category.tsx`**: uses **`groupCriteriaByCategory`**, **Collapsible** sections per category (only groups with at least one criterion), tooltips on category/criterion, and **`PlotRawMetricsByCategory`** in **`read`** vs **`edit`** modes.  
- **`plot-detail-panel.tsx`** / **`plot-edit-panel.tsx`**: replace the flat criteria list with this component and **`openPanel`** for category / criterion details.

**6 — Config route**  
- **`config.tsx`**: **“Category details”** button opens the category panel for **`selectedCriterion.categoryId`** (disabled when there is no selected criterion or no `categoryId`).

Biome **`check --write`** was run on the touched frontend files. Full-app `tsc` still reports existing issues elsewhere (e.g. `Card` / `Input` `variant` typing in ui-lib); there are **no remaining diagnostics** in the new/changed pieces above from that filtered run.

[REDACTED]

content.text:
I followed **`skills/git-commits/SKILL.md`**: checked the tree, chose a conventional type, and would only commit when there is a real diff.

**There is nothing to commit** in `/Users/psoudan/workspace/11-personal/portugal`: `git status` reports a **clean working tree** (no staged or unstaged changes).

The work from this session (including `plot-raw-metrics-by-category`, category/criterion panels, registry, config button, etc.) is **already on `main`**, folded into recent commits—for example **`77f1b33`** (`feat(frontend-web): expand plot workspace with dashboards and panels`), which lists `apps/frontend-web/src/components/plot-raw-metrics-by-category.tsx` among its files.

If you expected local edits that are not committed, they may be in another clone or branch; say which path/branch and we can commit there. If you want a **dedicated** commit that only contains the plot-metrics/panel slice (split from that larger commit), that would require an interactive history edit (e.g. reset/re-split); I can outline or do that only if you confirm that is what you want.
